changes.before: The south feeder road had changed under them overnight.
changes.after: The north feeder road had changed under them overnight.

changes.before: treated stock moving through ordinary kitchens, contamination laid into bread and porridge
changes.after: corruption worked into bread and porridge

changes.before: The body learning the wrong lesson in little obedient increments until death no longer ended the instruction.
changes.after: The body learning the wrong lesson until death no longer ended it.

changes.before: Grain teams south. Dispatch strings south.
changes.after: Grain teams north. Dispatch strings north.

changes.before: Some part of her, the one trained before it was taught to be afraid, could not help recognizing quality when she stood in it.
changes.after: Some part of her could not help recognizing quality when she stood in it.

changes.before: student-level obscenity that animated a corpse by brute twitch and borrowed motion
changes.after: blunt obscenity that made a corpse twitch by force

changes.before: Every village they passed... pressed the same answerless pressure against her mind.
changes.after: Antonidas would have named the danger at once. But the road kept asking it.

changes.before: Wounded were being carried toward a canvas shelter at the far side.
changes.after: Camp description trimmed to keep focus on command space.

changes.before: Still handsome enough to make first impressions for him.
changes.after: Arthas intro shortened to keep attention on authority and fatigue.

changes.before: "Ranger-General," he said, with the polished speed of a man raised never to let confusion show longer than useful.
changes.after: "Ranger-General," he said.

changes.before: "As contamination laid in deliberately and well enough to survive storage, baking, and repeated use."
changes.after: "Worked into it on purpose, and clean enough to survive the oven."

changes.before: "Regional. Depots, transfer books, storehouse routes, watcher discipline."
changes.after: "Not local. Depots. Road books. Storehouse routes."

changes.before: "moving south under your war traffic"
changes.after: "moving north under your war traffic"

changes.before: "Warn the city authorities before the next shipments disperse."
changes.after: "Warn the magistrates before the next loads scatter through the city."

changes.before: "counting sacks in Andorhal"
changes.after: Arthas objection tightened to remove the repeated sack-count beat from his longer sentence.

changes.before: "Enough for the Kirin Tor to draft memoranda and decide who ought to be responsible."
changes.after: "Enough for the Kirin Tor to send letters and decide who ought to be responsible."

changes.before: The line landed low and hard. Not because it was new. Because it was familiar.
changes.after: The line landed low and hard because it was familiar.

changes.before: No curtsy. No concession. Merely the acceptance of a fact already found wanting.
changes.after: No curtsy. No concession.

changes.before: Jaina could hear the shape of it even before the captain answered...
changes.after: Order consequence compressed to one sentence.

changes.before: the old princely conviction that if a threat could not be solved by force immediately applied, then it could wait until force had leisure for it
changes.after: the old princely certainty that if a threat could not be solved by force immediately applied, then it could wait

changes.before: "No more sanction," Jaina said.
changes.after: "No more asking," Jaina said.

changes.before: "Road south is clear enough for now."
changes.after: "Road north is clear enough for now."

changes.before: She had the childish urge to rehearse the argument and improve it by force...
changes.after: There was no missing sentence that would have fixed him.

changes.before: Enough to load the air more heavily every mile south.
changes.after: Enough to load the air more heavily every mile north.

changes.before: "the same phrase attached to the same kind of forgettable usefulness"
changes.after: "the same phrase in the mouth of the same kind of forgettable man"

changes.before: "The contamination sat in the air"
changes.after: "The wrongness was too broad here, too spread out."

changes.before: Below them the south road fed straight toward the gates
changes.after: Below them the road fed straight toward the gates

changes.before: This was the first time the whole mechanism stood in front of her
changes.after: This was the first time the whole thing stood in front of her

changes.before: perhaps the city would prove rude enough to believe in itself for him
changes.after: perhaps the city would believe in itself for him

changes.before: Because the city was there. Because Arthas had heard and chosen otherwise. Because the old farewell had repeated and still refused to become an answer. Because all the roads narrowed now toward walls that held no visible alarm at all.
changes.after: Because the city was there. Because Arthas had heard and chosen otherwise. Because the old farewell had repeated and still refused to become an answer.

flags: Research check: Light's Vengeance is canonically Arthas's paladin warhammer; kept.
Research check: Strahnbrad sits south/southwest of Andorhal in Warcraft geography; route references tied to the Andorhal approach were corrected from southward to northward movement.
Line 79 equivalent in v2 kept: Arthas saying he had gone farther south than intended still reads as campaign-position banter, not route geography.
